suggestions.topic: PTC committee caching decision for ePBS DevNet-0
suggestions.rationale: Decision required this week (ACDT #73, March 9). Attestations testing blocked until resolved; proposed fix is 256KB cache in beacon state.

suggestions.topic: BAL DevNet-3 launch status and EIP-8037 consensus bugs
suggestions.rationale: DevNet-3 was targeting March 11 launch but ACDT #73 revealed multiple cross-client consensus issues with EIP-8037. Teams flagged deep complexity concerns. Status check critical.

suggestions.topic: ePBS DevNet-0 testing scope: withdrawals, deposits, blobs
suggestions.rationale: ACDT #73 set action to test these features locally before live testing. DevNet-0 needs validation beyond basic finalization before advancing to DevNet-1.

suggestions.topic: SSZ Engine API content-type negotiation proposal
suggestions.rationale: Deferred to ACD for approval (ACDT #73). Proof-of-concept implemented across 6 clients. Addresses serialization bottleneck identified in Fusaka blob-devnet-0.

suggestions.topic: Gas repricing final numbers timeline update
suggestions.rationale: Originally targeted end of March (ACDT #69), but ACDT #71 reported test definition issues causing delays past month-end. Teams need updated timeline with 2 weeks left in March.

suggestions.topic: perf-devnet-3 sync issues and 5-Gigagas testing results
suggestions.rationale: ACDT #73 noted Reth/Nethermind/Besu sync issues and out-of-memory problems at 5 Gigagas. Critical data for validating gas limit roadmap beyond 150M.

Multiple teams (Geth, Nethermind) expressed strong concerns about EIP-8037 complexity in ACDT #73. 'Tendrils affecting everything' and 'disliked from complexity standpoint.' May need scope reconsideration.
ACDT #73 noted Nethermind/Reth not seeing major benefits yet from parallel I/O. DevNet-2 has dedicated benchmarking nodes; update on findings would inform optimization priorities.
